paintings.title: Ananda
paintings.subtitle: Original Dot-Work Mandala
paintings.inspiration: A radiant dot-work mandala built from hundreds of individual painted points. Deep sapphire blue at the heart blooms outward through rings of hand-laid gold, rich earth brown, and finally dramatic red petals at the outer edge — each point a moment of focused intention.

paintings.title: Dvaita
paintings.subtitle: Commission Work Only
paintings.inspiration: Painted on a circular canvas, Dvaita is a study in the union of opposites. A bold red and black yin-yang at the centre radiates outward through concentric rings of fiery orange, golden yellow, and deep teal — a mandala that holds both stillness and intensity at once.

paintings.title: Utsav
paintings.subtitle: Original Large-Scale Mandala
paintings.inspiration: One of the largest mandalas in the collection, Utsav commands the room. Painted on a gold-ground canvas, interlocking petal forms in cobalt blue, vivid orange, lime green, deep violet, and burnt amber create a composition that dazzles from across the room and rewards close attention.

paintings.title: Gajamata
paintings.subtitle: Prints Available
paintings.inspiration: Prints only — the original is sold. A tender Madhubani rendering of a mother elephant and her calf — both painted as stylised black silhouettes adorned with coloured geometric patterns in the tradition of Mithila folk art. Framed in silver, this piece brings the quiet dignity of the animal world into the home.

paintings.title: Nadi
paintings.subtitle: Original Madhubani Painting
paintings.medium: Ink and acrylic on paper, framed
paintings.inspiration: Two women perform a riverside ritual in this vibrant Madhubani scene — one offering into the sacred water while fish swim beneath and a sprawling tree arches overhead. Painted in bold traditional inks with a characteristic Mithila border, Nadi speaks of seasonal rhythms and feminine devotion.

paintings.title: Naukaa
paintings.subtitle: Original Madhubani Painting
paintings.inspiration: Two women share a boat ride on a sacred river — above them a stylised folk-art sun watches over the journey, while fish leap in the water below and flowering trees line both banks. A joyful, luminous Madhubani scene painted on handmade paper.

paintings.title: Vasant
paintings.subtitle: Original Floral Painting
paintings.inspiration: Vasant — the season of new beginnings — captured in vivid acrylic. Bold red flowers climb their stems across a radiant yellow ground, while a golden mandala anchors the composition on the left. The natural light catches its warmth and energy perfectly.

paintings.title: Chatushpada
paintings.subtitle: Original Madhubani Scroll Painting
paintings.inspiration: Four sacred animals — tortoise, peacock, owl, and elephant — each held in their own circular medallion in this tall vertical Madhubani scroll. Painted in the bold, flat style of Mithila folk art with a traditional border of leaf and dot motifs, Chatushpada is as striking above a fireplace as it is on a narrow hallway wall.

paintings.title: Aditya
paintings.subtitle: Original Folk Painting on Paper
paintings.inspiration: Aditya — the radiant sun deity — peers from a circular face of ochre and flame-red, bold folk-style rays cutting through an intricate black mehndi-work ground. Painted in ink and watercolour on paper, this piece carries the raw immediacy of traditional Indian folk expression.

paintings.title: Vivah
paintings.subtitle: Commission Work Only
paintings.inspiration: Vivah — the sacred union — is one of the most ambitious works in the collection. Across a panoramic canvas, five women in celebration encircle a bride enthroned under a ceremonial canopy, the whole scene laced with flowering vines in the characteristic Mithila style. A painting that fills a wall and fills a room with life.

paintings.title: Mayura Yugma
paintings.subtitle: Original Madhubani Painting
paintings.medium: Ink and acrylic on canvas board
paintings.inspiration: Two peacocks face each other across a folk-art border of leaves, flowers, and geometric patterns — their tail feathers unfurled, beaks nearly touching. Painted in the Madhubani tradition on canvas board, Mayura Yugma is a small, intimate piece that carries enormous presence.

paintings.title: Sakhiyaan
paintings.subtitle: Original Madhubani Painting
paintings.inspiration: Two women sit close beneath a blossoming tree, lost in quiet conversation. A peacock perches in the branches above; a decorative fish border frames the scene to the right. Sakhiyaan — meaning 'companions' — is painted in the Madhubani tradition with vivid yellows, reds, and greens.

paintings.title: Bhaskar
paintings.subtitle: Original Folk Painting on Canvas
paintings.inspiration: A larger and more resolved rendering of the sun deity than Aditya, painted on stretched canvas. Bhaskar — 'the one who shines' — confronts you directly with wide expressive eyes set in a bold circular face. The mehndi-pattern ground is densely worked and the colours richly warm. A painting that stops the eye.

paintings.title: Kamdhenu
paintings.subtitle: Original Folk Painting
paintings.inspiration: Kamdhenu — the divine wish-fulfilling cow of Hindu tradition — walks in regal procession across a deep terracotta ground. Adorned with a garland of rudraksha beads, a decorated mandala saddle cloth, and golden anklets, she carries a pink lotus. Painted in the Pichwai-inspired folk tradition on stretched canvas.

paintings.title: Neela
paintings.subtitle: Limited Edition Archival Print
paintings.inspiration: Neela — the blue one — is a digital mandala of exacting geometric precision. Concentric rings of deep navy, steel blue, and silver unfold from a still sapphire centre, each petal-form tessellating perfectly into the next. Printed on archival paper and signed Art Vasu, this is an accessible way to bring the mandala tradition into your home.

paintings.title: Chakra
paintings.subtitle: Commission Work Only
paintings.inspiration: Chakra — the wheel of life — radiates from a golden Om symbol nested at a deep pink lotus centre. Concentric rings of hand-laid dots, geometric triangles, emerald jewels, and a burnished copper band expand outward against a dark cosmic ground. Every layer a meditation, every dot an intention.
